seoTitle: Cape Jaffa vs Caralue — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cape Jaffa and Caralue. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Cape Jaffa vs Caralue: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cape Jaffa and Caralue.
heading: Cape Jaffa vs Caralue — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cape Jaffa, South Australia and Caralue, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cape Jaffa has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Caralue (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cape Jaffa or Caralue safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cape Jaffa has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Caralue scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cape Jaffa scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Caralue scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cape Jaffa or Caralue?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cape Jaffa has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
